rqs: How do QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort compare to Bubble, Insertion, Selection, Shell, and Bucket sorts in terms of time and space complexity?
Which of QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort are stable, and how does stability influence their suitability for software developers and data engineers?
In which benchmark suites or open‑source repositories do QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and TimSort outperform traditional sorts in comparisons and swaps?
base_query: ("Software Developers" OR "Algorithm Researchers" OR "Data Engineers" OR "Computer Science Students" OR "Embedded Systems" OR "researcher") AND ("QuickSort" OR "MergeSort" OR "HeapSort" OR "Radix Sort" OR "TimSort") AND ("Bubble Sort" OR "Insertion Sort" OR "Selection Sort" OR "Shell Sort" OR "Bucket Sort") AND ("Time Complexity" OR "Space Complexity" OR "Stability" OR "Comparisons" OR "Swaps") AND ("Academic Journals" OR "Conference Proceedings" OR "Open Source Repositories" OR "Benchmark Suites" OR "Industry Reports")
arxiv_query: (all:"Software Developers" OR all:"Algorithm Researchers" OR all:"Data Engineers" OR all:"Computer Science Students" OR all:"Embedded Systems" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"QuickSort" OR all:"MergeSort" OR all:"HeapSort" OR all:"Radix Sort" OR all:"TimSort") AND (all:"Bubble Sort" OR all:"Insertion Sort" OR all:"Selection Sort" OR all:"Shell Sort" OR all:"Bucket Sort") AND (all:"Time Complexity" OR all:"Space Complexity" OR all:"Stability" OR all:"Comparisons" OR all:"Swaps") AND (all:"Academic Journals" OR all:"Conference Proceedings" OR all:"Open Source Repositories" OR all:"Benchmark Suites" OR all:"Industry Reports")

questions.text: Does the study clearly describe the sorting algorithms evaluated and their implementations?
Are experimental settings (hardware, datasets, benchmark suites) fully reported?
Is the methodology for measuring time and space complexity validated or referenced?
Are results presented with statistical analysis or confidence intervals?
Does the study discuss the relevance of findings to software developers or data engineers?
